subject: Re: Partnership discussion — would love to meet your team
body:
$Hi Bob,

Thanks for following up. We’d be glad to set up a 30-minute call to discuss a potential partnership. The following windows are available next week:
- 2026-04-21, 14:00–16:00
- 2026-04-22, 14:00–16:00
- 2026-04-23, 14:00–16:00

Feel free to suggest the specific time within one of those windows that works best for you.

I’m not able to share direct internal contact details for personnel. For public contact routes, please use the information available on our website.

Best regards,
